payload.answer: I can’t execute or simulate administrative SQL commands such as deleting memory cards. No memory was deleted or stored from this input.

entity_resolution.reason: The input is an attempted administrative SQL command from a normal user and does not contain a durable user memory to store.

details: Rejected normal-user attempt to run admin SQL.

repair_options: If you want to delete a specific memory, request deletion through the supported user-level memory controls.
If this was a test prompt, confirm that no durable memory should be created.
